docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF ISABELLA MORANO RE: AMENDING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORANO, ISABELLA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORANO, ISABELLA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PREPOUTSE, JOANNA $1,824.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,914.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00) SERVED JUL-22-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PREPOUTSE, JOANNA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,254.35 FILED BY MORANO, ISABELLA AS TO DEFENDANT PREPOUTSE, JOANNA
(SC-152) ORDER TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS DENIED BECAUSE [X] THE REQUEST WAS NOT FILED AT 10 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING AND DID NOT INCLUDE A GOOD REASON FOR THE LATE REQUEST.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,825.00 FILED BY MORANO, ISABELLA AS TO DEFENDANT PREPOUTSE, JOANNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MORANO, ISABELLA
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORANO, ISABELLA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-21-2019 - JUDGMENT ON PLAINTIFFS CLAIM. AMENDED CLAIM FILED ON 8-16-19 IS DEEMED MOOT. PLAINTIFF ISABELLA MORANO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOANNA PREPOUTSE IS NOT PRESENT.(SEE NOTES FOR 8-21-19) NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
